inspection_scope: shadow_runner paper/shadow evidence builder and validator
paper/shadow validator fixtures and unit tests
profitability maturity rollup and contract gap visibility

hidden_defects.condition: PAPER/SHADOW sample counts can pass scorecard input while long-run evidence remains absent.
hidden_defects.impact: Operator or downstream reports could confuse PAPER scorecard input with long-run live-review evidence.
hidden_defects.fix: Added long-run window/span fields, explicit long_run_evidence_eligible flag, visible long_run_blocker_code, and negative validator fixture.
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: Keeps live and scale-up false; blocks false long-run claims.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: Maturity rollup next action now says longer PAPER/SHADOW windows are required.
